## Summary

## Public safety checklist

- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate-public-safety.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate-identity-neutrality.py`.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, auth stores, memory, sessions, logs,
      caches, state databases, private profile data, or private plugin data.
- [ ] I did not add generated authorship trailers or assistant co-author
      trailers.
